steps.title: Set up the intercept
steps.content: The $y$-intercept of $y=f(x)$ occurs where $x=0$, so evaluate $f(0)$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $9$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $9$.
